note: SHA-256 sealed predictions. Hash = public commitment. Plaintext is revealed at resolution. Calibration = the singular number that matters at each horizon.

predictions.thesis_public: Cumulative unique-IP views on aureliex.com + saathvikpai.com during the drop window 2026-04-20T04:20:00-04:00 → 2026-04-20T16:20:00-04:00 will exceed the target.
predictions.calibration_metric: view growth rate from baseline (the singular number that matters)
predictions.reveal_method: GET /api/views at 2026-04-20T16:20:00-04:00; count unique IPs within horizon; compare to plaintext threshold
predictions.next_sha_trigger: At resolution, plaintext is revealed, Brier-analog calibration is computed, sp-002 is sealed with the miscalibration folded in.
